tasks.notes: FGAP-026 phase 1.2 progress at HEAD f4dd1a2. C.3 PARTIAL-FAIL at d64cb33 surfaced 20/826 pi-workflows test failures + atomic-boundary correction. DEC-0021 d64a0f3 canonicalized per-package atomic cascade. C.3 COMPLETION lands at 856e139 + f4dd1a2: Gate A (3 step-shared resolveSchemaPath test rewrites use mkdtempSync + writeBootstrapPointer), Gate B (compileAgentSpec catches BootstrapNotFoundError + skips contextBlocks injection), Gate C (4 mkdtempSync sites cascaded across loop.test.ts + resume.test.ts), plus realpath canonicalization fix f4dd1a2 for macOS /var vs /private/var. pi-workflows tests now 824/826 pass / 0 fail / 2 skipped (down from 20 failures). Sections landed: A bb2c7d5, B 9846b90, C.1 8f33a38, audit-fix cluster, DEC-0018, E reverted, C.2 99436c3, DEC-0019/0020/0021, FGAP-033/034 filed, scripts/orchestrator/ POC bundle, C.3 PARTIAL d64cb33, C.3 COMPLETION 856e139 + f4dd1a2. Ahead per sequenced steps: (3) retroactive C.2 pi-jit-agents source audit, (4) pre-dispatch C.4 pi-behavior-monitors audit, (5) canonical sub-phase analysis update per DEC-0021, (6) status cascade. Then F (project-dir.test.ts) + Section E re-roll + Phase 1.3.
